2604.27096.title: Think it, Run it: Autonomous ML pipeline generation via self-healing multi-agent AI
2604.27096.paper_summary: The purpose of our paper is to develop a unified multi-agent architecture that automates end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline generation from datasets and natural-language (NL) goals, improving efficiency, robustness and explainability. A five-agent system is proposed to handle profiling, intent parsing, microservice recommendation, Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) construction and execution. It integrates code-grounded Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for microservice understanding, an explainable hybrid recommender combining multiple criteria, a self-healing mechanism using Large Language Model (LLM)-based error interpretation and adaptive learning from execution history. The approach is evaluated on 150 ML tasks across diverse scenarios. The system achieves an 84.7% end-to-end pipeline success rate, outperforming baseline methods. It demonstrates improved robustness through self-healing and reduces workflow development time compared to manual construction. The study introduces a novel integration of code-grounded RAG, explainable recommendation, self-healing execution and adaptive learning within a single architecture, showing that tightly coupled intelligent components can outperform isolated solutions.
2604.27096.paper_summary_zh: 我們的論文目的是開發一個統一的多代理架構，該架構自動化從數據集和自然語言（NL）目標生成端到端的機器學習（ML）管道，提高效率、穩健性和可解釋性。提出了一個五代理系統來處理配置檔、意圖解析、微服務推薦、有向無環圖（DAG）構建和執行。它整合了基於代碼的檢索增強生成（RAG）以理解微服務，結合多個標準的可解釋混合推薦系統，使用基於大型語言模型（LLM）的錯誤解釋和從執行歷史中自適應學習的自我修復機制。該方法在150個ML任務中進行評估，涵蓋多種情境。該系統實現了84.7%的端到端管道成功率，超越了基準方法。它通過自我修復顯示出改進的穩健性，並與手動構建相比減少了工作流程開發時間。這項研究在單一架構中引入了基於代碼的RAG、可解釋的推薦、自我修復執行和自適應學習的新整合，顯示出緊密耦合的智能組件可以超越孤立的解決方案。
2604.27096.author: Adela Bara et.al.
2604.27096.authors: Adela Bara, Gabriela Dobrita, Simona-Vasilica Oprea
